---
title: "Tutorial: Overview and Rules"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: cerulean
---

Hello students,

This website contains the information for your tutorial on conditional independence and the local Markov property.
You have each been allocated a group: 1, 2 or 3. You should click on the tab labelled with your group number and spend 30 minutes reading through the material.
It is very important you don't go onto other websites or other groups' pages. Examiners will be walking around to ensure that people are remaining on the correct site page.

This tutorial is designed to teach you more about modelling joint probability distributions. Go at your own pace and make sure you fully understand the information you are reading.

Enjoy!
